# models/
# =======
# This directory holds pre-trained ML model artifacts.
#
# Models are generated by the training scripts in ml/training/:
#   - fault_classifier.joblib   ← train_fault_classifier.py
#   - failure_predictor.joblib  ← train_failure_predictor.py
#
# These files are NOT committed to git (they are large binaries).
# Run the training pipeline to generate them before building the
# Docker image.
